headline: Uber Taps Zoox Robotaxis To Test Autonomous Economics In Key Cities
summary: Uber Technologies (NYSE:UBER) is partnering with Amazon owned Zoox to bring purpose built robotaxis onto the Uber app. Zoox vehicles will be offered to Uber riders for the first time outside Zoox’s own app. The initial rollout is planned for Las Vegas and Los Angeles, ahead of a broader potential deployment on Uber’s platform. For Uber, this move fits directly into its core ride hailing and mobility business, where autonomous driving has been a long term focus across the industry. Large...

headline: Uber’s Zoox deal latest in broad autonomous vehicle push
summary: Uber just announced a partnership with Zoox, Amazon’s robotaxi subsidiary, and the stock jumped nearly 3% on the news. Market analyst Jason John summed it up cleanly: “It’s another example of their foray into the AV business. I mean, this is one of many deals. Zoox is the latest, but Wave, Wasabi, Lucid, you know, ... Uber’s Zoox deal latest in broad autonomous vehicle push

headline: Amazon’s New Bets In Ultrafast Delivery AI Shopping And Robotaxis
summary: Amazon.com (NasdaqGS:AMZN) has launched "Amazon Now" 15 minute delivery in Brazil, entering ultrafast grocery and convenience delivery in Latin America’s largest e commerce market. In the US, Amazon is rolling out more direct to consumer features, including AI assisted "Buy for Me" shopping and expanded third party integrations for merchants. The company also secured a legal decision limiting the use of external AI bots on its marketplace, affecting how outside tools can access Amazon...

headline: Global Power Solutions Appoints Pete Medved as President & Chief Executive Officer to Lead Innovation
summary: Vancouver, BC, Canada, March 12, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Global Power Solutions Corp. (TSXV: PWER) (FSE: NJA) (“Global Power” or the “Company”) is pleased to announce the appointment of Pete Medved as President & Chief Executive Officer (“CEO”) of the Company, effective immediately. Mr. Medved brings more than two decades of experience in enterprise technology sales, strategic account leadership, and large-scale digital infrastructure projects across both the public and private sectors.
